visualizations.title: Definition of Integers Set
visualizations.description: Mathematical representation of the Integers set including negative, zero, and positive elements.

steps.explanation: Standard mathematical symbol representing the infinite set of all integers.
Enumeration showing integers extend infinitely in both negative and positive directions from zero.
Additive inverse property: Every integer has a unique negative that sums to zero, distinguishing it from natural and whole numbers.

visualizations.title: Integer Number Line with Opposites
visualizations.description: Visualizing integers on a bidirectional number line with emphasis on symmetry around zero.
